title: +PARRY MACE
description: Replaces the mace hit sound effect with a dynamic parry sound effect carefully crafted using Ultrakill and Minecraft sound effects in audacity. Made by Siamcheese  (pack.png made by @Xk_ofc on twitter/x)
body:
This resource pack aims to replace the mace soudn effects with a dynamic mix of the ULTRAKILL PARRY sound effects and miencrafts mace sound effects. The audios were combined and tweaked using AUDACITY to make it feel as impactful as possible compared to more mainstream parry resource packs.

air mace sound effects use a parry sound effect + a trailing mace effect for more impact

ground mace attacks use a perfect parry sound effect + a trailing ground mace effect for more impact and crumble

Heavy mace hits use a Jackhammer parry + perfect parry + trailing ground mace effect for maximum impact and feel.

announcement/demonstration video https://youtu.be/aSAkFOAIpK4?si=j9EFE97P3DwR8woH

pack.png made by @Xk_ofc on twitter/x
